title: Trump to lift sanctions on Turkey to possibly sell F-35 jets
shortDescription: Trump said he would lift sanctions on Turkey, which would could allow Ankara to buy F-35 jets.

title: Trump says Melania hates the 'YMCA' dance, which appeared at World Cup
shortDescription: Donald Trump has long done the fist-pumping "Y.M.C.A." dance, despite his wife's wishes. Belgium appeared to do it after beating USA in the World Cup.

title: Trump demands GOP take up longshot measure to pass voting reforms
shortDescription: Donald Trump's latest demand: that congressional Republicans combine voting reforms with defense spending and bring both to his desk before recess.

title: Mike Johnson's birthright citizenship threat, explained
shortDescription: House Speaker Mike Johnson and other congressional Republicans are taking aim at birthright citizenship. Many barriers stand in their way.

title: Young Castro is open to Trump deal for Cuba's future. 5 takeaways
shortDescription: The most important things Raúl Guillermo Rodríguez Castro said about dealing with Trump and the United States in an exclusive USA TODAY interview.

title: Trump reveals new White House helipad
shortDescription: President Trump says a new White House helipad with a presidential seal is underway, paid for by Sikorsky

title: Platner weighs future of Senate bid after new sexual assault allegation
shortDescription: U.S. Senate candidate Graham Platner is facing a new allegation from a Maine woman who said he forced her to have sex with him nearly five years ago, which Platner denies.

title: Graham Platner wins key Democratic nod in Maine US Senate race
shortDescription: Maine oyster farmer Graham Platner won in the Democratic nomination for the U.S. Senate on June 9 despite scrutiny over a Nazi-linked tattoo.

title: Red card controversy puts Infantino, Trump relationship in the spotlight
shortDescription: President Donald Trump and FIFA president Gianni Infantino have a storied history even before a controversial call that led to a red card suspension.

title: Collins continues to deny 2020 election results as FBI investigates
shortDescription: Hundreds of FBI field agents have joined 2020 election investigation in Fulton County, Georgia. Collins continues to spread election denial claims.

title: Trump adds 'beautiful helipad' to White House makeover
shortDescription: The helipad is needed to handle the new, more powerful helicopters in the fleet used to transport Trump to and from the White House, he said.

title: Trump rings the stock market's opening bell from the Oval Office
shortDescription: Donald Trump rang the bell to celebrate the launch of investment accounts for children.

title: How do Trump Accounts work? $1k for these kids now live
shortDescription: Trump Accounts for kids are a legit investment savings accounts for children under 18. These kids are eligible for seed money. How do they work?

title: GA Republicans say no to turning up thermostat. Georgia Power disagrees
shortDescription: Georgia Republicans responded to a social media post from NYC Mayor Mamdani, calling turning up thermostat "communist." Here's what Georgia Power says.
